a.xlink:title: Main umbrella header for the entire ToyGine2 engine.
Umbrella header for the engine application module.
Umbrella header for the engine core module.
Umbrella header for the audio module (volume types, mixing, etc.).
Umbrella header for the engine mathematics module.
Umbrella header for the network module (socket errors, addressing, etc.).
Umbrella header for platform UI types.
Umbrella header for the render module.
Application version type and comparison operators.
Implementation of application version management utilities.
additional linux platform header
Platform and CPU architecture enumerations with compile-time and runtime detection.
Assertion system for runtime and compile-time validation of engine invariants.
Non-owning string view class for C-style strings.
C++ concept for string-like types with size() and c_str() methods.
Template callback pool class with fixed-size callback storage.
Constexpr utility functions for compile-time operations.
Template string class with fixed-size character buffer.
Compile-time format string validation class.
CRC hash functions.
Output string stream class for building strings from various data types.
Core utility functions for string manipulation, encoding conversion, and number formatting.
Inline implementations for CStringView class.
Inline implementations for template callback pool class with fixed-size callback storage.
Inline implementations for constexpr utility functions.
Inline implementations for FixedString template class.
Inline implementations for FormatString class.
Implementation of OStringStream template methods.
Inline implementations of core utility functions for string manipulation and encoding conversion.
Debug and Release assertion macro implementations for GCC/Clang platforms.
Volume category enumeration for audio mixing and per-channel gain control.
Fixed-point numeric type template.
Standard library extensions for toy::math::fixed: numeric_limits.
General math utilities.
2D floating-point vector class for interactive game objects and physics calculations.
Inline implementations for toy::math::fixed.
Inline implementations for General math utilities.
Inline implementations for 2D floating-point vector class.
Socket and network operation error codes.
Return value for message box / dialog interactions.
Screen orientation enumeration for UI layout and rotation handling.
Bit flags for framebuffer clear operations (color, depth, stencil).
Pixel format enumeration for render targets and textures.
